section.heading: Basis of distributee partner’s interest
section.chapeau: In the case of a distribution by a partnership to a partner other than in liquidation of a partner’s interest, the adjusted basis to such partner of his interest in the partnership shall be reduced (but not below zero) by—

paragraph.content: the amount of any money distributed to such partner, and
the amount of the basis to such partner of distributed property other than money, as determined under section 732.
